programme.desc: In the past 50 years, sea lion populations have declined more than 80% along the North Pacific coast. Scientists at the University of British Columbia, and the Vancouver Aquarium, are working together to help save North America’s iconic and largest pinniped - the stellar sea lion.

programme.title: Lost In Java
programme.desc: A group of world-class professional big-wave surfers travel half-way around the world to attempt to surf a never before surfed 20 foot tube off the coast of Java in Indonesia. Former big-wave World Tour Champion Grant ‘Twiggy’ Baker from South Africa, Hawaiian’s Mark Healey and Billy Kemper along with Australian Ryan Hipwood and Tasmania’s Mikey Brennan, were locked in for the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: Xplash Ep103
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. Today we’ll soar with the North Kiteboarding Team, slackline across the treacherous gorge at Victoria Falls, and we begin this episode with gonzo wakeboarding in Sweden.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep104: Tiger Sharks + Night Diving With Sharks + Blacktip Sharks
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV features Tiger Sharks, night diving with Sharks, how shark’s smell, how shark coloration works and introduces us to Blue Sharks.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The best of the best are back to compete, and Don’s serving up a heaping plate of his signature 10-part PRT. A bear crawl down a mountain, log running and two-point planks are just some of Don’s welcome gauntlet. And the cherry on top—a 5k desert run. But the contestants only have themselves to blame. Because when you’re already amongst the elite, you have to do whatever it takes to find the one who stands above the rest.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The CIA has called again, and Don has answered the call on behalf of the A-team. A team of special operatives are needed for a highly classified peace mission that could turn deadly at a moment's notice. To spearhead their mission training efforts, the team hits the range with some state-of-the-art SIRT pistols. Then, the gloves are off and the team gets their first course of fire for the season. After the fun course of fire, the team switches gears to knife throwing and fire building, with the help of Top Knives. It’s safe to say, these All-stars aren’t waiting a second.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Laura is back with Will Harris and family on their legendary farm. This week, we take a step further to unraveling the philosophies that make Will one of the true innovators of our time. Laura also gets to see how the “Poorest town in America” has been impacted for the better due to Whit Oak Pastures and their commitment to the community they serve. Later, Laura and Will get gussied up to attend a gala that recognizes Will for his dedication.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Mann announces a reconnaissance and surveillance mission is imminent. The contestants are then tasked with electing a mission commander, while another top-notch competitor joins their ranks. Next, it’s not a day on Surviving Mann without a little physical training and a unique course of fire equipped with a folding AR.

programme.title: Real Man TV
programme.desc: In the last episode, Kyle took to the skies; now it’s the seas. Co-host Josh Peterson joins Kyle on a deep sea fishing excursion that ends in one of them losing their lunch.. but who will it be? Later (after everyone’s cleaned up) the gang reconvenes for a legendary course of fire with some serious artillery.. and Bob.

programme.title: Journey Through the Lofoten Islands
programme.desc: Visit the spectacular Lofoten Islands of northern Norway in this relaxing nature film. Soar above the mystical peaks that plunge into the ocean, and enjoy the quaint villages that dot the remote shorelines of the fjords. The full film is 90 minutes in length and available to subscribers of NatureStream.tv.

programme.title: Yosemite Waterfalls & Wildflowers
programme.desc: In the Spring Yosemites spectacular waterfalls combine with an exquisite display of Dogwood blossoms to create an awe inspiring experience like no other. The spectacular cinematography is accompanied by a beautiful acoustic guitar soundtrack.

programme.title: Preview for Slo Mo Snow
